docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2024 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,947.76 FILED BY CHOW, GLENN AS TO DEFENDANT RUTZ, MAXIMILLIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-08-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-08-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF GLENN CHOW IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MAXIMILLIAN RUTZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00); REMARKS: RESPONDENT CAME TO THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE AT CITY HALL, ROOM 456 AND WAS SERVED THE DOCUMENTS. SERVED FEB-13-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RUTZ, MAXIMILLIAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOW, GLENN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUTZ, MAXIMILLIAN $1,315.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,415.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
